THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GAMEZ HOME DECORATORS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHEATUM, ANTHONY RICHARD STEPHENS, PEARL $1,520.00 PRINCIPAL, $53.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,573.00, $20.00 BOUNCED CHECK. DEFT PEARL STEVENS IS DISMISSED BY PLFT IN COURT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
